comment: Clayworks' clay barrel is the vanilla BlockBarrel/Barrel entity under its own blocktype, so it consumes our retting barrel recipes but missed the RettingBath interceptor — sealing produced instantly-retted bundles via the raw fallback recipe. Attach the same behaviors as game:blocktypes/wood/barrel. Note: this blocktype declares behaviorsByType (which overrides any plain behaviors property), so the block behavior must merge into the '*' entry.
